title: keckia corymbosa
intro: Keckia corymbosa, also known as American St. John's Wort, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which help to reduce stress and anxiety. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing symptoms of depression, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Keckia corymbosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional.
